title: Copper Charge
description: Adds a unique way to upgrade copper armor and tools with lightning
body:
With the addition of copper armor, Minecraft has received a new reliable source of armor & tools for early game... but what if it could go further? 
With Copper Charge Data Pack, your copper armor and tools can be charged with lightning! 
![Copper armor on an armor stand being charged by a lightning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52df261f6f166758663a555e8353d6dbfd3cac7f.jpeg)

While you have any of copper items equipped during thunderstorm, you have a small chance of being struck by a lightning, which would charge items in your armor slots, main hand and off hand. Charged copper tools are as powerful as diamond ones, but have greater reach, while charged copper armor is a little weaker than diamond, but has greater enchantability. This makes copper a viable choice for both early game and end game.
